description: Read a vault note's content and parse its YAML frontmatter
output_schema: {path: str, content: str, frontmatter: dict, body: str, size_bytes: int}

description: Write or update a vault note with content and frontmatter
input_schema: {vault_path: str, note_path: str, content?: str, frontmatter?: dict, body?: str}

description: List notes in a vault directory with basic metadata
input_schema: {vault_path: str, dir_path: str, pattern?: str, recursive?: bool}
output_schema: {directory: str, pattern: str, files: list, count: int}

description: Check a note's frontmatter against schema_version 2 requirements
output_schema: {path: str, valid: bool, errors: list, warnings: list}

description: Audit wiki-links in a note or set of notes
output_schema: {links: list, broken: list, total: int, broken_count: int}

description: Write a CSV or JSON report to 06_EXECUTION
input_schema: {vault_path: str, report_name: str, report_type?: str, headers?: list, rows?: list, data?: dict, subdir?: str}

description: Move a note between vault locations
Read a CSV registry file and return its contents
input_schema: {vault_path: str, registry_path: str, filter_field?: str, filter_value?: str}
output_schema: {path: str, headers: list, rows: list, count: int}

description: Append a row to a CSV registry
Send a message via MCP to an external service
input_schema: {vault_path: str, server_name: str, tool_name: str, arguments: dict}
